text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I walk past the hollowed-out stump, I
notice two items next to it that look about three
times bigger than what they should be.
choice_data_list: Is that a mortar and pestle?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ♪ I'm about to make some mochi! My
dormmates have been asking for some.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Well, I figured I could make a bigger batch with
bigger tools. I want everyone to have their fill and
then some! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I can make everyone happy with my buono mochi!
The bigger the better as they say!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Akebono! The rice is done!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Great! Time to get started, then!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono takes the enormous pestle and
begins to make mochi with some other
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Heeeaaave!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hooooo!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Pheeeeew! This thing's pretty heavy!
choice_data_list: Why don't you take a quick break?
You must be putting a lot of strength into that.
You must be putting a lot of strength into that.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Pheeeeew! This thing's pretty heavy!
choice_data_list: Why don't you take a quick break?
You must be putting a lot of strength into that.
You must be putting a lot of strength into that.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that's a good idea. I wanna have a nibble
of the mochi anyways. ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey, you guys over there! Do you want some
mochi too? It's piping hot and ready to eat! ☆

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: What? You made mochi?! Can I really have some?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Have as much as you'd like! Get 'em
while they're warm! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, back to you! What do you want on your
mochi? We've got soy sauce and grated radish! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely! We're gonna make loads more
anyway, so don't hold back! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The "sample" I get is about the size of my head,
but Hishi Akebono's mochi really is delicious.
Everyone smiles brightly as we eat together.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm, it's not so much my strength but my
weight that I'm throwing into this...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Using your weight to pound mochi makes it more
chewy and tasty!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty big, so consider this technique my
specialty!
choice_data_list: I see. What a good technique!
I see. What a good technique!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Right? Like I always say, the bigger the better! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The mochi Hishi Akebono makes with her unique
technique has an incredible springiness and is
extremely delicious!
